hooks.command: echo '[ai-templater] Declare role and why before responding.'

echo '[ai-templater] STOP before editing — (1) Is this change explicitly approved by the user? (2) Bugfix/refactor: identified ALL entry points? Feature: identified ALL integration points with existing code? If not — complete analysis first.'
echo '[ai-templater] Changes applied. Verify: (1) matches approved plan exactly? (2) no scope creep? (3) obvious regressions?'
echo '[ai-templater] Architect: do NOT proceed to implementation without explicit user approval.'
echo '[ai-templater] Reviewer: Challenge block is required before Uncertainty. Do not skip it.'
